name: Urban Edge Properties
description: Urban Edge Properties is a publicly traded real estate investment trust (REIT) listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol UE. The company specializes in owning, managing, acquiring, developing, and redeveloping retail real estate located in high-density, supply-constrained urban communities. Its portfolio is primarily concentrated along the Washington, D.C. to Boston corridor, focusing on shopping centers that serve densely populated markets. By leveraging its expertise in retail property management and development, Urban Edge Properties aims to create long-term value through strategic investments in prime urban locations.
